Reduced Administrative Responsibilities By outsourcing your manpower, you can minimize administrative responsibilities typically associated with long-term employees.

From flexibility and cost efficiency to accessing specialised expertise and fresh perspectives, these arrangements empower you to tailor your workforce to suit the projects unique requirements. Additionally, reduced administrative responsibilities and risk mitigation aspects further enhance the advantages of such hiring arrangements.

Specialised Expertise Sydney is home to a diverse and talented pool of carpenters with specialised skills and expertise. Hiring professionals on a temporary or casual basis allows you to tap into this vast talent pool and access the specific skills needed for your project.

If you encounter issues with a particular worker, such as poor performance or misconduct, you have the flexibility to replace them without the complexities associated with terminating full-time employees. This ability to quickly address any personnel concerns helps maintain project timelines, ensuring that the construction process remains on track. Hiring Carpenters on a temporary or casual basis can bring numerous benefits to your construction or renovation project.

These professionals often bring diverse experiences and have worked on various projects, enabling them to offer innovative solutions and design concepts. Increased union influence may steer these independent Tradies towards conforming to standardised norms, stripping away their ability to make personalised business decisions and potentially pressuring them into union memberships. Whats more concerning is the potential encroachment on the rights and decision-making autonomy of these Contractors. Even if they manage to navigate the tests successfully, they might still face limitations on crucial aspects of their work, such as scheduling, job selection, pricing, and business operations.

The employee-like policy, initially purported to target gig-workers and digital economy entities, has cast a shadow over the self-employed Tradies. an essential fabric of the Construction sector for centuries. Designed to set minimum standards for work arrangements, this policy aims to scrutinise any form of work that diverges from the conventional full-time employment model. The impact.

Through various and on-going tests, it will be determined whether they are a person who is serving an employer and their business, or if they are a person that is carrying on their own trade or business. It requires regular maintenance to prevent rot and pest damage. Composite decking, however, is low-maintenance, resistant to common decking issues, and available in various colours and finishes.

2 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={} open=off] Composite decking is known for its low-maintenance and resistance to environmental wear, making it a long-lasting choice with a variety of aesthetic options. Fibre cement decking also offers durability and low maintenance, with the added benefit of fire resistance. This makes it ideal for areas with high fire risk, whereas composite decking might be preferred for its wider range of colours and finishes.

While hardwood provides a classic aesthetic, composite decking is ideal for those seeking minimal upkeep and environmental benefits due to its recycled content. [/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=Hardwood Decking vs. Steel Decks _builder_version=4. 25. 2 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={} open=off] Hardwood decking provides a warm, natural appearance and can be sanded and refinished over time. It does require regular maintenance to stay in top condition.

2 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}] Hardwood decking offers a natural, traditional look and is durable and long-lasting. However, it requires regular maintenance, such as staining or oiling, to maintain its appearance. Composite decking is low-maintenance, resistant to fading, staining, and scratching, and often comes with long warranties.

With steel decks, you can ensure your deck will withstand the elements and maintain its structural integrity over time. Composite decking is crafted from a blend of wood fibres and recycled plastic, creating a durable and environmentally friendly alternative to traditional wood decks. This innovative material resists fading, staining, and scratching, ensuring your deck remains beautiful with minimal upkeep. Available in a variety of colours and finishes, composite decking can complement any outdoor aesthetic. Get it Done can supply and install all leading brand Composite Decking Boards.

Our steel decks provide unmatched strength and durability, making them ideal for a robust and lasting outdoor structure. Perfect for any outdoor setting, these decks ensure that your deck will withstand the elements and maintain its structural integrity over time. The inherent strength of steel offers superior resistance to wear and tear, pests, and extreme weather conditions, ensuring your deck remains stable and secure.

These frames are designed to support heavy loads and withstand various weather conditions, ensuring the longevity of your deck. Additionally, the hybrid nature of these frames allows for quicker installation compared to traditional methods, reducing labour costs and project timelines. It does require regular maintenance to stay in top condition. Steel decks, in contrast, offer superior strength and resistance to pests and rot, with minimal maintenance required. They are particularly suited for commercial or high-traffic areas where durability is paramount.

They are ideal for areas needing high durability and strength but can be more expensive and may need professional installation. Fibre cement decking, meanwhile, is highly durable, fire-resistant, and low-maintenance.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 _builder_version=4. 27. 4 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}][et_pb_row _builder_version=4. 27. 4 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column type=4_4 _builder_version=4. 27. 4 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 27. 4 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}] Come and join our hard-working, supportive and collaborative team.

Hands-on Experience: Apprentices work under the supervision of qualified carpenters, gaining experience in general construction, framing carpentry, fix out carpentry and more. Formal Education: The formal education for a Carpentry apprenticeship is done by attending classes to learn theory, safety regulations and carpentry techniques. Earning While Learning: Apprentices get paid a wage while training. This makes it a financially viable pathway into the industry.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=1_2 _builder_version=4. 24. 2 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}][et_pb_image src=https://www. getitdonecarpentry. com. au/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Get-it-done-carpentry-career-hero-min. jpg alt=Carpenter Jobs title_text=Get It Done Carpentry Career Hero-min disabled_on=off|off|on _builder_version=4. 27.

Nationally Recognized: Completing the carpentry apprenticeship leads to a vast range of career paths and opportunities Nationally. Weather you want to hone in your skills to carpentry or explore other avenues of construction, carpentry is foundational. Government Support and Incentives: Carpentry apprentices may be eligible for financial incentives, such as the Additional Identified Skills Shortage payment , to support their training or loans.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 admin_label=Core Values module_class=s_split_hero _builder_version=4. 26. 0 _module_preset=default background_color=#f5f5f5 use_background_color_gradient=on background_color_gradient_direction=90deg background_color_gradient_stops=rgba(245, 245, 245, 0) 35%|rgba(245,245,245,0.

Those that realise this start to really learn, they begin to use their tools every day and begin to understand them. Grabbing the right tool for the job will become second nature. Working at Get it Done is fast paced and carpentry focussed, efficiency and finesse being key attributes. You will earn as you learn with any apprenticeship, the difference is realised as you develop your skills and efficiencies. A master of their craft is truly an asset to any project.

The master carpenter is always sought after and in demand. The need to build more and more homes, coupled with the lack of highly skilled trades people is creating imbalances in the market, opening up a world of opportunities for the carpenter, opening new doors for carpentry careers. Key Features of a Carpentry Apprenticeship: Certificate III in Carpentry : Certificate III in Carpentry is required to become a licensed carpenter in Australia.

If you like the idea of being a carpenter and have a true desire to learn the trade, doing an apprenticeship with Get it Done will develop you into a well-balanced carpenter. You will work on different sites with different carpenters / mentors and carry out a range of carpentry tasks. You will learn the tools of the trade, what tools you need and how to use them. The importance of building and maintaining your own kit will quickly become apparent.

4 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 27. 4 _module_preset=default header_text_color=#DFB758 global_colors_info={}] Chatswood’s Unique Architecture – Why We Love Working Here Chatswood is a suburb with real architectural soul. From Federation-era homes with ornate timber detailing to post-war brick cottages and mid-century gems , the area is packed with buildings that tell a story. These homes weren’t just built—they were crafted.

And that’s something we respect deeply. At Get It Done Carpentry, we love working on older homes because they offer: Superior build quality —solid hardwood framing, hand-cut joinery, and materials that have stood the test of time. Unique character —no two homes are the same, and every renovation is a chance to preserve history while adding modern function. Creative challenges —tight access, quirky layouts, and heritage features push us to think smart and build with precision.

# Get it Done Carpentry and Construction

Get it Done Carpentry and Construction is a Sydney-based company providing professional carpentry services including custom cabinetry, timber decking, door & window installation, kitchen renovations, bathroom renovations, pergolas, fencing, and general carpentry & maintenance. Contact:
- Phone: +61 404 533 399
- Email: saulgetsitdone@gmail. com
- Address: Sydney, NSW
- Website: https://www. getitdonecarpentry. com.

It requires regular maintenance to prevent rot and pest damage. Composite decking, however, is low-maintenance, resistant to common decking issues, and available in various colours and finishes. 0 _module_preset=default background_color=#FFFFFF background_enable_color=on global_colors_info={} open=off] Hardwood decking provides a warm, natural appearance and can be sanded and refinished over time. It does require regular maintenance to stay in top condition. Steel decks, in contrast, offer superior strength and resistance to pests and rot, with minimal maintenance required. They are particularly suited for commercial or high-traffic areas where durability is paramount.

Timber decking is versatile and can be easily customised with stains and paints but requires regular upkeep to prevent rot and pests. 5 _module_preset=default custom_padding=10px||||| hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} module_id=Our Process sticky_enabled=0][et_pb_column type=4_4 _builder_version=4. 27. 4 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 27. 5 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}] Our Process – Carpentry Made Simple Carpentry is what we do, so we can make it easy to get the right help for your project.

Our team specialises in framing, fix-out, cladding, and decking that respects original architecture while meeting modern standards. We’re known for our ability to blend traditional timber detailing with contemporary construction methods—delivering results that are both beautiful and structurally sound.

As carpenters and builders ourselves, we understand the details and know how to connect you with the right person. Call Us Direct – You’ll speak with me personally, not a call centre. We Understand Carpentry – Because we’re carpenters too, we know exactly what you mean and what’s needed. We Line It Up – I’ll match you with the right carpenter for the job. Quick Turnaround – For most jobs, we can have someone on site within a few days.

Larger or specialised projects may take longer, but we’ll keep you updated. It’s that easy. Direct, personal, and reliable—because when you deal with us, you’re dealing with carpenters who get it. Please contact us for more detail or organise a site visit today. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_accordion module_id=Inner West Service Area _builder_version=4. 27.

From structural framing to custom fix-out finishes, we work closely with builders and homeowners to ensure every timber element is installed to spec and built to last. With decades of combined experience and a reputation for reliability, we’re trusted by Inner West clients who value craftsmanship and clear communication. Our carpenters coordinate seamlessly with other trades to keep projects moving and meet tight timelines—without cutting corners.
